intro.title: Cold Open
intro.text: Your phone buzzes. Unknown number. A video attachment labeled: PLAY ME.

choices.text: Delete it and go to bed

video.title: The Tape
video.text: Static. A hallway. Your hallway. Someone whispers your name from behind the camera.

choices.text: Grab a knife (bad idea, but vibes)

bed.title: Denial
bed.text: You wake at 3:33 AM. Something is breathing in the corner.
